message:
fix(cbor,host): add recursion depth limit to CBOR canonicalization and minor cleanups

- cbor/lib.rs: add MAX_CANONICALIZATION_DEPTH (128) guard to
  canonicalize_value_in_place to prevent stack overflow on
  deeply nested CBOR structures. Returns PayloadTooLarge error
  when exceeded.
- host/doctor.rs: add 'static bound to ConnectorRegistry for DoctorService
  to satisfy task::spawn lifetime requirements
- sdk tests: rustfmt formatting normalization (no logic changes)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
